description_long: This is a robust, urban-style couch with a utilitarian design, featuring a sturdy black base and side panels that appear to be made of metal or painted wood. The seating area consists of four distinct, rectangular seat cushions and four matching back cushions, all upholstered in a dark brown leather or leather-like material. The cushions are set into a tan or beige frame, providing a subtle contrast and a sense of structure. The armrests are high, straight, and integrated into the side panels, which are angled for support and durability. The back of the couch is solid and flat, with no visible decorative elements, emphasizing its functional, public-use character. This type of couch is commonly found in public transit stations, waiting areas, or other urban environments where durability and easy maintenance are priorities.
description: A sturdy, urban-style couch with four brown leather cushions set in a tan frame and high, angled side panels. The design is utilitarian, with a solid black base and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing four brown seat and back cushions, tan frame, and high, straight side panels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled, solid side panel and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, solid back with no visible cushions or decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the angled side panel and cushion depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four rectangular seat cushions and four matching back cushions, all attached and integrated into the frame, with no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown upholstery with a smooth, slightly matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not exposed; the couch sits on a solid, continuous black base that is blocky and flush with the ground.
attribute_armrest_design: High, straight armrests integrated into the angled side panels, constructed from the same material as the side and base, with no padding or decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, attached backrest divided into four cushioned sections, matching the seat cushions in size and material, with a flat, solid structure.
